sourceSummary.oneLine: Design and Development Verification Report for models A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW covering transport environment verification.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents design verification checks and results for transport safety, including vibration and drop tests with visual inspection and performance image comparison.
keyPoints: Drop Test and Vibration Test are identified as ensuring product safety for transportation.
Visual inspection criteria check deformation, crack, loosening of screw, separation, and mechanical damage.
Performance check criteria compare images before and after the test and verify no difference.
Results state no mechanical damage and no difference in images before and after the test.
Referenced transport environment test report number is SGS-R23-0128-EN00.
